goal: #26 设置页完善: 摄像头参数调节 + TTS 配置 + 快捷键提示

coverage_checklist.camera_tab_implemented: assert: 设置页摄像头标签实现设备选择 + 分辨率/FPS 配置
coverage_checklist.tts_tab_implemented: assert: 设置页新增 TTS 标签（开关/语速/音高/语音选择）
coverage_checklist.shortcuts_tab_added: assert: 设置页新增快捷键提示标签
coverage_checklist.settings_expanded: assert: useSettings 接口扩展 cameraDeviceId/ttsEnabled/ttsRate 等字段
coverage_checklist.typecheck_pass: assert: bun run typecheck 通过
coverage_checklist.test_pass: assert: bun run test 通过
